targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUM(balance_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM accounts WHERE NOT closed
SELECT SUM(balance_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM accounts WHERE NOT closed AND NOT offbudget
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_value_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS value FROM holdings
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS value FROM income WHERE month = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now')
SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS value FROM spending WHERE month = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now')

SELECT ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0) FROM income WHERE month = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now')) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0) FROM spending WHERE month = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now'))) / 100.0 AS value

panels.title: Uncategorized
panels.description: On-budget transactions with no category. Run `actual categorize --apply` to fix.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM transactions WHERE category_id IS NULL AND account_offbudget = 0 AND transfer_id IS NULL

panels.title: Stale subscriptions
panels.description: Detected subscriptions that haven't fired in their expected window. Cancellation candidates.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM subscriptions WHERE is_active = 0

panels.title: Banks with stale imports (>48h)
panels.description: Banks whose last successful FinTS fetch was more than 48 hours ago.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pipeline_status WHERE source != 'sync' AND (strftime('%s', 'now') - strftime('%s', last_run_iso)) > 172800

panels.title: New payees this week
panels.description: Payee names that first appeared in the last 7 days. Worth a glance to catch new recurring charges.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT payee_name) AS value FROM transactions WHERE payee_name IS NOT NULL AND date >= date('now', '-7 days') AND payee_name NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT payee_name FROM transactions WHERE payee_name IS NOT NULL AND date < date('now', '-7 days'))

panels.title: Net worth over time (cash + investments)
panels.description: On-budget cash is the running total of all on-budget transactions. Investments comes from holdings_history snapshots taken on every Baader fetch.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ymd_unix AS time, SUM(SUM(amount_cents)) OVER (ORDER BY ymd_unix) / 100.0 AS "On-budget cash" FROM transactions WHERE NOT account_offbudget GROUP BY ymd_unix ORDER BY ymd_unix
SELECT snapshot_unix AS time, SUM(total_value_cents) / 100.0 AS "Investments" FROM holdings_history GROUP BY snapshot_unix ORDER BY snapshot_unix

panels.title: Recent unusual transactions (last 14 days, >2× payee average)
panels.description: Transactions in the last fortnight that are at least 2× the payee's 6-month average. Surfaces unexpected one-off charges from familiar payees.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH payee_avg AS (SELECT payee_name, AVG(ABS(amount_cents)) AS avg_amt FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-180 days') AND payee_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payee_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3) SELECT t.date AS Date, t.payee_name AS Payee, COALESCE(t.category_name, '(uncategorized)') AS Category, -t.amount_cents / 100.0 AS "Amount (EUR)", ROUND(p.avg_amt / 100.0, 2) AS "Payee avg (EUR)", COALESCE(t.notes, '') AS Notes FROM spending t JOIN payee_avg p ON t.payee_name = p.payee_name WHERE t.date >= date('now', '-14 days') AND ABS(t.amount_cents) > 2 * p.avg_amt ORDER BY ABS(t.amount_cents) DESC LIMIT 20
